commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
The city of letters. Perhaps so called, from some famous school or library kept there. (Challoner)
The explanation, that is, is added by the Vulgate. (Haydock)
Madrid, in Arabic, means "the mother of sciences. "(Menochius)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The city of letters: Perhaps so called from some famous school, or library, kept there.
